description: LLM-generated SQL executed via text() without bind parameters; LLM can be prompt-injected via attacker-controlled database contents to generate queries with time-delay functions (pg_sleep, SLEEP) or subqueries accessing unauthorized tables, bypassing statement-type validation.
remediation: Add pattern-based blocking for time-delay functions (pg_sleep, SLEEP, BENCHMARK) to _DANGEROUS_SQL_PATTERNS; consider mandatory query preview with human confirmation for non-SELECT statements; implement query result sanitization before returning to LLM context to prevent second-order prompt injection.
exploitation_path: Attacker stores prompt-injection payload in database field → Agent reads field → LLM incorporates payload into next query generation → LLM generates SELECT with pg_sleep(10) → Query passes validation (valid SELECT, no pattern match) → execute(text(query)) runs 10-second delay

description: Full SQL queries logged via logger.info and logger.error, exposing queries that may contain PII in WHERE clauses (email, SSN, name) or sensitive authentication tokens in query predicates.
remediation: Redact query parameter values before logging; log only the query structure or a sanitized version with placeholders; alternatively, log only a query hash and store full queries in a secure audit system with restricted access.

description: SQL queries containing personal data (email addresses, names, national IDs in WHERE clauses) written to application logs without redaction, violating data minimization and confidentiality principles.
remediation: Implement query parameter redaction before logging; use a salted hash of sensitive predicates or log only query structure; ensure application logs are not retained longer than necessary and are protected with appropriate access controls.

description: Query results containing PII stored in chat history without mandatory TTL; max_retained_tokens config is optional (defaults to None), allowing indefinite retention of personal data in conversation context.
remediation: Set a default value for max_retained_tokens appropriate for the use case; implement automatic purging of chat history older than retention policy; add per-session TTL tracking and enforce deletion of PII-bearing query results after session expiry.
